answer:
<think> The question asks for the name of the person who wrote a 2015 comedy-drama film directed by the director of a movie that won the Academy Award for Best Picture in 1998. I know that the director of the 1998 Best Picture winner is Steven Soderbergh. I need to find out which 2015 comedy-drama film he directed and who wrote the screenplay for that film. </think>

<answer> The 2015 comedy-drama film directed by Steven Soderbergh is called "Magic Mike XXL." The screenplay was written by Reid Carolin. </answer>

<boxed> Reid Carolin </boxed>
